creator: tianpan.co

evidence.text: Most LLM applications launch, observe some failures, patch the prompt, and repeat. That's not a flywheel — it's a treadmill. A real data flywheel is a self-reinforcing loop: production generates feedback, feedback improves the system, the improved system generates better interactions, which generate better feedback. Each revolution compounds the last.

title: Data Flywheels for LLM Applications: Closing the Loop Between Production and Improvement
